nasb.text: And when we had all fallen to the ground, I heard a voice saying to me in the Hebrew dialect, ‘Saul, Saul, why are you persecuting Me? It is hard for you to kick against the goads.’

esv.text: And when we had all fallen to the ground, I heard a voice saying to me in the Hebrew language,  ‘Saul, Saul, why are you persecuting me? It is hard for you to kick against the goads.’

cnv.text: 我們都仆倒在地上，我聽見有聲音用希伯來話對我說：‘掃羅！掃羅！你為甚麼迫害我？你要踢刺是難的。’

ccb.text: 我们都倒在地上，我听见有声音用希伯来话对我说，‘扫罗！扫罗！你为什么迫害我？你很难用脚去踢刺。’

csbs.text: 我们都仆倒在地。我听见有声音用希伯来语对我说：‘扫罗，扫罗！你为什么逼迫我？你脚踢刺棒，是狂妄的。’
